short_description.val: Public university located in Multan, Pakistan, established in 1975, offering a wide range of undergraduate and postgraduate programs across various disciplines.

facilities_notes.val: Central Library with approx. 3,000,000 books across central and departmental libraries; online OPAC, research catalogue, IEEE, HEC Digital Library, and other electronic resources.

Free services: Library, Medical (Outdoor), First Aid, Ambulance, Pharmacy, Green Space Access, Career Development Center, Mind Care and Wellness Center, Access to visit all buildings, Legal Services, Sports ground, Water Filtration Plant, Jinnah Auditorium (for Students). Subsidized services: Hostel Accommodation, IT Services, Hostel Mess, Transport, Accommodation for Employees, Community Center, University Executive Club, Jinnah Auditorium (outsider), Cafeterias, University Day Care Center.

research_and_faculty_notes.val: The university has around 630 faculty members, of which 389 hold doctoral degrees.

Research topics include Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, Climate Change and Environmental Sustainability, Cybersecurity and Data Privacy, Renewable Energy Technologies, Healthcare Innovations and Telemedicine, Blockchain and Financial Technologies, Genomics and Biotechnology, Education Technology and Learning Sciences, Advanced Materials and Nanotechnology.

notes.val: Vision Statement: BZU aims to be global leader in knowledge creation, innovation, and social impact. At BZU, we empower future generations with technology and sustainability with a vision to create a tech-savvy, inclusive and environmentally responsible campus.

Mission Statement: At Bahauddin Zakariya University, our mission is to advance knowledge, foster innovation, and create a lasting social impact through excellence in education and research. We are committed to empower our students with a transformative educational experience that integrates cutting-edge technologies and sustainable practices. Through a diverse and inclusive environment, we aim to cultivate critical thinking, ethical decision-making, adaptability and entrepreneurial skills. Our goal is to prepare our graduates to excel as responsible global citizens, equipped to meet the challenges of the future and to contribute positively to the world.

Faculties listed: Faculty of Arts and Social Sciences; Faculty of Commerce Banking & Business Administration; Faculty of Engineering & Technology; Faculty of Islamic Studies & Languages; Faculty of Pharmacy; Faculty of Science; Faculty of Agricultural Sciences and Technology; Faculty of Veterinary Sciences; Faculty of Food Science and Nutrition; Faculty of Law; B. Z. University Sub-Campus Vehari; B. Z. University Sub-Campus Lodhran.

short_description.val: Welcome to the website of the Lahore School of Economics - a distinguished seat of learning known for high quality teaching and research. The Lahore School of Economics or “The Lahore School” was established in 1993 and chartered by the Government of Punjab in January 1997.

address.val: Intersection Main Boulevard Phase VI DHA, Burki Road Lahore 53200, Pakistan.

facilities_notes.val: Main Campus Library provides facilities for over 500 students with access to e‑databases such as ScienceDirect, JSTOR, EBSCO Host, and more.

The Lahore School of Economics Main Campus is a purpose built campus, with teaching and administration facilities, libraries, gymnasium, playing fields and multiple cafeterias, which house the Lahore School's Undergraduate programmes, Graduate programmes and Research Centres.

address.val: 104-C-2 Gulberg III , Lahore 54792 Pakistan.

contacts_notes.val: The City Office serves as the admissions office for all degree programmes of the Lahore School of Economics.

facilities_notes.val: City Campus Library offers similar e‑database access and serves students at the Gulberg location.

General Admission Notes.val: Admissions are based on merit with 75% seats allocated on merit and 25% reserved for passed‑outs of ADA/ADS/ADC etc.
Age limit: applicants must be under 26 years (24 years for post‑Intermediate); exemptions apply for B.Ed, MBA Executive, spouses and employees of the university, and armed forces personnel.
Self‑Finance seats require payment of Rs. 100,000 per year in addition to regular or self‑support semester fees.
For the College of Pharmacy, self‑finance seats require Rs. 200,000 per year in addition to regular fees.
PhD admission test equivalent to GRE/HAT General with a passing score of 60% (or 60% in HEC‑accredited test).
Admission criteria for foreign students are determined by the University Admission Committee.
Form transfer is allowed under specific conditions such as vacant seats and applicant eligibility, as detailed in the admission regulations.

Scholarship_notes.val: Scholarships and Financial Aid information

CM Punjab HONHAAR SCHOLARSHIPS Phase 3 - 2025: BS (Honors) FALL 2025 04 years eligible. Covers total tuition fee only; lodging, boarding and transportation not included. No age limit, Punjab domicile, family income < Rs. 350,000 (public) or Rs. 500,000 (private). Minimum FSc/Intermediate marks 70% (Sciences) /65% (Arts). Merit based.
HEC Need Based Scholarship: Rs. 6000 stipend per month plus actual tuition/semester. Open to enrolled students in regular BS/MA/MSc programs.

Benazir Scholarship: 50% of scholarships reserved for female students; 2% for physically challenged. Targets undergraduate 4‑5 year programs. Eligibility includes newly admitted students (Spring/Fall 2020), merit‑based admission, and HEC‑approved degree programs.

short_description.val: SZABIST is a non-profit and Chartered Institute of Science and Technology, established through Legislative Act of the Sindh Assembly (Sindh Act No. XI of 1995) and awarded university status in September 2023.

ranking.val: HEC ranked SZABIST as one of the best business schools of Pakistan; CIEC rated it "Outstanding" with 6 Stars (2008‑2012) and Mechatronic Engineering department "World Class" with 7 Stars.

LLB Tuition – Application Handling: Rs. 2,000 (Non‑refundable). Admission Fee: Rs. 30,000 (Non‑refundable). Security Deposit: Rs. 15,000 (Refundable). Student Activity: Rs. 5,000 per annum. Tuition (4 courses): Rs. 213,600 per annum. Course Registration: Rs. 2,000 per year. Examination: Rs. 2,000 per year. Total approx. Rs. 269,600 (Pakistani). (Source: Fee Structure – International Degree Programs section)

University of London fees (for LLB) – Application handling £65, Initial registration £696, Module fee £864 per year, Examination fee £1,104 per year, Dissertation £574. (Source: Fee Structure – International Degree Programs section)

admission_requirement_for_new_student.val: Minimum age 17. Must have three GCE A‑Level subjects (one at least grade D) or equivalent, or a bachelor’s degree from an acceptable institution. English language requirements: IELTS ≥6 (min 5.5 each), or TOEFL iBT ≥87 (21+ Reading/Writing, 19+ Speaking/Listening).

tuition_notes.val: CertHE Common Law Tuition – Application Processing: Rs. 2,000 (Non‑refundable). Admission Fee: Rs. 30,000 (Non‑refundable). Security Deposit: Rs. 15,000 (Refundable). Student Activity: Rs. 5,000 per annum. Tuition (5 courses): Rs. 253,500 per annum. Course Registration: Rs. 2,000 per annum. Examination: Rs. 2,000 per annum. Total approx. Rs. 312,000 (Pakistani). (Source: Fee Structure – International Degree Programs section)

General Admission Steps.val: All applicants must appear in an entrance test and interview/group discussion held by SZABIST University.
Submission of required academic certificates and their attestation by IBCC (for local candidates) or equivalency from HEC (for international qualifications).
For graduate programs, verification of the last degree by HEC is mandatory.

General Admission Notes.val: SAT score conversion: 1500‑1600 = 50 marks, 1400‑1499 = 45, 1300‑1399 = 40, 1200‑1299 = 35, 1100‑1199 = 30. 100% in SZABIST admission test equals 50 marks.
For master’s programs, 50% score of GMAT is considered.
GAT (General) / HAT relevant with minimum 50% score is mandatory for MS programs; GRE General minimum cumulative score 300 is also accepted.
GAT (Subject) minimum 60% (or GRE Subject 640) is required for PhD programs.

Scholarship_notes.val: Approximately 80 % of SZABIST students receive some form of financial assistance each year. Scholarships include need‑based, merit‑based, endowment‑fund scholarships for various provinces, HEC‑USAID merit and need‑based, ICT scholarships, Qarz‑e‑Hasna facility by Ihsan Trust, and many community‑sponsored scholarships.
SZABIST‑Funded Scholarships: Need‑Based, Merit‑Based, Talent‑Based, Sindh Police Shaheed Scholarship.

External Donor Funded Scholarships: SEEF, Chief Minister SZABIST Merit & Need‑Based, BEEF, Higher Education Opportunities for Balochistan & FATA, Orange Tree Foundation, HEC Indigenous PhD Fellowship, Sindh HEC Indigenous, PEEF.
Loan Facilities: Ihsan Trust Qarz‑e‑Hasna (Interest‑Free), EDUFI Study Now Pay Later, TCF Financial Assistance.
Contact for scholarships and loans – External Relations & Financial Assistance (ERFA) Department, Room No. 5, 153 Campus, Phone: +92 21 35823433 Ext. 371 & 374, Email: erfa@szabist.edu.pk.

research_and_faculty_notes.val: Research centers include SZABIST Center for Biosciences Research (SCBR), Sustainable Development Research Center (SDRC), Sindh Abhyas Academy (SAA), and the university publishes the Journal of Independent Studies and Research (JISR).

notes.val: SZABIST University is a member of AACSB International.
BBA program is affiliated with the CFA Institute’s University Affiliation Program (UAP).
SZABIST offers an International Certificate in Logistics and Transport (level 3) as an accredited training provider of CILT.
After two years at SZABIST Karachi, students may transfer to Coventry University, UK for the final year of the BA (Hons) Business Studies degree.
BS Accounting & Finance program is accredited by ICAP, granting 9 exemptions in the CA Pakistan qualification; a 2.5‑year fast‑track option is available for ICAP CAF qualified students.
Evening law programme enables students to earn a University of London LLB (Hons) degree in a minimum of two years for bachelor‑degree holders, three years for standard entry.
Vision: SZABIST University aims to be a globally recognized institute for excellence in education, research, development, and distinction in service.

Mission: SZABIST University is committed to produce highly qualified professionals to meet national and global contemporary needs, conduct cutting edge research and development, provide hi‑tech scientific and technological expertise, meet socio‑economic challenges, and uphold global citizenship responsibility.

short_description.val: The University of Peshawar established in the year 1950 has got the sole privilege and pride to be the first ever University created after independence and since then serving as the mother institution in the field of education in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa.

Area Study Centre (Russia, China & Central Asia)

General Admission Notes.val: The Directorate of Admissions was established in 2001 to streamline admission procedures for Undergraduate, Postgraduate, and Higher Studies (M.Phil./Ph.D.) programs. It consists of four sections: Admissions Information Management System (AMIS) for Undergraduate and Postgraduate programs, M. Phil/Ph.D Section (Room No. 105), Affiliated Colleges section (Room No. 102), and Scholarship Section.

notes.val: Vision: To be a prominent public sector university in the region, recognized for its global perspective, diverse and supportive learning environment, having international reputation in research and creative discovery and emphasis on leadership development. Mission: The University of Peshawar, a future-oriented and unique institution is committed to achieving excellence in the undergraduate and graduate education, research and public service. The University provides superior and comprehensive educational opportunities through doctoral and special professional educational levels. The University contributes to the advancement of society through research, creative activity, scholarly inquiry, and development of knowledge. The University preserves and promotes arts, benefits the nation’s economy, serves the citizens through public programs and is dedicated to the production of quality human resource for the knowledge-driven development of the country.

short_description.val: At the University of South Asia, our AI-powered programs prepare you to excel in every field. Master smart software development in Computer Science, harness AI for business strategy, and explore cutting-edge diagnostics in Medicine. Unleash creativity with AI in Arts, analyze social trends in Humanities, and pioneer sustainable solutions in Environmental Studies.

contacts_notes.val: Office Hours: Monday to Saturday, 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM

facilities_notes.val: Student clubs, sports, dining facilities, leadership development programs, volunteer opportunities, media and publications are available on campus

General Admission Steps.val: Visit the official admission portal on the university website.
Create an account using a valid email address and phone number.
Complete the online application form with accurate personal and academic information.
Upload all required documents, including academic transcripts and identification.
Submit the application and proceed to pay the application fee through the available secure payment methods.
Receive a confirmation email with further instructions.
